ApplyScript: BUFF生效时的效buff_BUFF的ID（唯一英文）时的效果

self:AddEvent("EndRound", function() local buff = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_electric_orb"); if buff == nil then return end; local focus = 0; local fb = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_focus"); if fb ~= nil then focus = fb.buffConfig.Level end; local dmg = math.max(0, 3 + focus); local count = buff.buffConfig.Level; for i = 1, count do self:SetStatus("AllRandomEnemy1"); self:Damage(tostring(dmg)); end end);

self:AddEvent("EndRound", function() local buff = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_ice_orb"); if buff == nil then return end; local focus = 0; local fb = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_focus"); if fb ~= nil then focus = fb.buffConfig.Level end; local blk = math.max(0, 2 + focus); local count = buff.buffConfig.Level; self:SetStatus("Self"); for i = 1, count do self:ChangeDefence(tostring(blk)); end end);

self:AddEvent("StartRound", function() local buff = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_plasma_orb"); if buff == nil then return end; local focus = 0; local fb = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_focus"); if fb ~= nil then focus = fb.buffConfig.Level end; local en = math.max(0, 1 + focus); local count = buff.buffConfig.Level; self:SetStatus("Self"); for i = 1, count do self:ChangePower(tostring(en)); end end);

self:AddEvent("StartRound", function() local fb = self.Self:GetBuff("Defect_buffsample_focus"); if fb == nil then return end; fb.buffConfig.Level = fb.buffConfig.Level - 1; if fb.buffConfig.Level <= 0 then self:RemoveBuff("Defect_buffsample_focus"); end end);
